value.rationale: The claim is that OpenAI offers Context7. The page describes Context7 as a third-party MCP server (a "free MCP server for developer documentation" from Upstash, linked to github.com/upstash/context7). The page documents how to connect Codex to Context7 as an example external server, but it does not assert that OpenAI offers/owns Context7 — it is an Upstash product. The page substantiates Context7's existence but not OpenAI as its provider.
